IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC CONSERVES, RESTORES, AND MANAGES WETLANDS AND ASSOCIATED HABITATS FOR NORTH AMERICA'S WATERFOWL. THESE HABITATS ALSO BENEFIT OTHER WILDLIFE AND PEOPLE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. CONSERVES, RESTORES, AND MANAGES WETLANDS AND ASSOCIATED HABITATS FOR NORTH AMERICA'S WATERFOWL. THESE HABITATS ALSO BENEFIT OTHER WILDLIFE AND PEOPLE.
IRS990.Desc: DIRECT CONTRIBUTION AND GRANTS TO DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. (FEIN 13-5643799) TO CONSERVE, RESTORE, AND MANAGE WETLANDS AND ASSOCIATED HABITATS FOR NORTH AMERICA'S WATERFOWL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule D, Part X, Line 2 FIN 48 (ASC 740) footnote
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. (DUI) AND WETLANDS AMERICA TRUST, INC. (WAT) AND DUCKS UNLIMITED, LANDS, LLC (DUL) ARE RECOGNIZED AS ORGANIZATIONS EXEMPT FROM FEDERAL INCOME TAX UNDER 501(A) AS ENTITIES DESCRIBED IN SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE U.S. INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, EXCEPT FOR TAXES ON INCOME FROM ACTIVITIES UNRELATED TO ITS EXEMPT PURPOSES. THE ORGANIZATION DOES NOT HAVE ANY MATERIAL UNRECOGNIZED TAX POSITIONS THAT SHOULD BE RECOGNIZED IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AS OF JUNE 30, 2024 OR 2023.

FundraisingEventInformationGrp.Event1Nm: East Cooper DU 27th Annual Oyster Roast at SEWE

IRS990ScheduleG.ExplanationIfNoTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. GROUP RETURN IS LICENSED WHERE REQUIRED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule G, Part III, Line 17 Distributions required under state law
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: STATE=ALASKA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=376386;STATE=ARKANSAS,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=896083;STATE=CALIFORNIA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=2885886;STATE=DELAWARE,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=113718;STATE=FLORIDA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1148296;STATE=IOWA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=528853;STATE=IDAHO,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=662147;STATE=ILLINOIS,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1235268;STATE=INDIANA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=722418;STATE=KENTUCKY,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=133328;STATE=LOUISIANA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1320156;STATE=MASSACHUSETTS,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=165204;STATE=MARYLAND,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=464856;STATE=MICHIGAN,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1095400;STATE=MISSOURI,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=600180;STATE=MONTANA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=489343;STATE=NORTH CAROLINA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1756563;STATE=NORTH DAKOTA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=133674;STATE=NEBRASKA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=285339;STATE=NEW MEXICO,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=48280;STATE=NEVADA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=307596;STATE=NEW YORK,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=833216;STATE=OREGON,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=21807;STATE=PENNSYLVANIA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=473844;STATE=RHODE ISLAND,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=24182;STATE=SOUTH CAROLINA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=962715;STATE=TENNESSEE,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=296081;STATE=TEXAS,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=3747430;STATE=VIRGINIA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=138004;STATE=VERMONT,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=76949;STATE=WASHINGTON,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=455798;STATE=WISCONSIN,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=1715419;STATE=WEST VIRGINIA,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=67797;STATE=WYOMING,MANDATORY DISTRIBUTION AMOUNT=198492;

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule I, Part I, Line 2 Procedures for monitoring use of grant funds.
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROCEDURES FOR MONITORING GRANT FUNDS WITHIN THE UNITED STATES DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. REPORTS ON CONSERVATION ACCOMPLISHMENTS ON AN ANNUAL BASIS THROUGH THE ANNUAL REPORT AND ALSO THROUGH THE WEBSITE (DUCKS.ORG). THESE ACCOMPLISHMENTS ARE EXPRESSED IN "ACRES CONSERVED" AS WELL AS CONSERVATION EXPENDITURES BY STATE. IT IS CRITICAL THAT DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. KEEPS ITS VOLUNTEERS AND MEMBERS FULLY ENGAGED WITH ITS MISSION THROUGH EDUCATION AND COMMUNICATION OF OUR GOALS AND ACCOMPLISHMENTS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 5a Compensation contingent on revenues of the organization
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL REGULAR, BENEFITS-ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES PARTICIPATE IN A VARIABLE COMPENSATION PLAN THAT IS BASED ON MEETING BUDGETED GOALS FOR REVENUE, INCOME, EXPENSE EFFICIENCY, MEMBERSHIP AND ACRES PROTECTED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 5b Compensation contingent on revenues of a related organization
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL REGULAR, BENEFITS-ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES PARTICIPATE IN A VARIABLE COMPENSATION PLAN THAT IS BASED ON MEETING BUDGETED GOALS FOR REVENUE, INCOME, EXPENSE EFFICIENCY, MEMBERSHIP AND ACRES PROTECTED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 6a Compensation contingent on net earnings of the organization
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL REGULAR, BENEFITS-ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES PARTICIPATE IN A VARIABLE COMPENSATION PLAN THAT IS BASED ON MEETING BUDGETED GOALS FOR REVENUE, INCOME, EXPENSE EFFICIENCY, MEMBERSHIP AND ACRES PROTECTED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule J, Part I, Line 6b Compensation contingent on net earnings of a related organization
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL REGULAR, BENEFITS-ELIGIBLE EMPLOYEES PARTICIPATE IN A VARIABLE COMPENSATION PLAN THAT IS BASED ON MEETING BUDGETED GOALS FOR REVENUE, INCOME, EXPENSE EFFICIENCY, MEMBERSHIP AND ACRES PROTECTED.

DUCKS UNLIMITED INC. (DUI), A RELATED ORG, PAYS THE CEO/EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. IN ORDER TO ESTABLISH COMPENSATION, DUI USES A COMPENSATION COMMITTEE, INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANT, COMPENSATION SURVEY AND REQUIRES APPROVAL BY THE PERSONNEL POLICY COMMITTEE. DUCKS UNLIMITED GROUP, INC. DOES NOT DIRECTLY PAY THE CEO/EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Schedule M, Part I Explanations of reporting method for number of contributions
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Art - Works of art - Number of items received Clothing and household goods - Number of items received Cars and other vehicles - Number of items

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 2 Family/business relationships amongst interested persons
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: KATHY AND STEVE CHRISTIAN - Family relationship

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 6 Classes of members or stockholders
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE COUNCIL OF STATE TRUSTEES AND NATIONAL DELEGATES ARE MEMBERS OF DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. (DUI).

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 7a Members or stockholders electing members of governing body
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED, INC. (DUI) HAS A BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND OFFICERS THAT ARE ELECTED BY A BODY OF MEMBERS OF DUI. THE OFFICERS OF DUI, OTHER THAN THE CHIEF EXECUTIVE OFFICER AND EXECUTIVE SECRETARY, SHALL BE ELECTED FROM THE MEMBERS OF DUI. ONLY THOSE INDIVIDUALS THAT ARE CURRENT MEMBERS OF DUI SHALL BE ELIGIBLE TO SERVE AS AN OFFICER. THE AFFAIRS OF DUI ARE MANAGED BY ITS BOARD OF DIRECTORS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 11b Review of form 990 by governing body
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COPY OF THE 990 IS DISTRIBUTED TO A COMMITTEE OF THE BOARD, THE PERSONNEL POLICY COMMITTEE. ONCE APPROVED BY THE PERSONNEL POLICY COMMITTEE, THE 990 IS DISTRIBUTED TO THE FULL BOARD FOR APPROVAL. THE FULL BOARD WILL APPROVE BY A SIMPLE MAJORITY BEFORE THE 990 IS FILED

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 12c Conflict of interest policy
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EMPLOYEE COMPLIANCE WITH THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY IS REGULARLY AND CONSISTENTLY MONITORED VIA AN ANNUAL CONFLICT OF INTEREST SURVEY. ALL EMPLOYEES ARE REQUIRED TO DISCLOSE POTENTIAL CONFLICTS TO AN INDEPENDENT PARTY (DIRECTOR FINANCIAL REPORTING AND AUDIT). IF A CONFLICT IS NOTED DURING THIS PROCESS, IT IS RESOLVED THROUGH DISCUSSIONS WITH UPPER MANAGEMENT, HUMAN RESOURCES, THE EMPLOYEE, HIS/HER DIRECT SUPERVISOR AND THE DIRECTOR OF FINANCIAL REPORTING AND AUDIT. BOARD MEMBERS AND COMMITTEE MEMBERS ARE REQUIRED TO PRESENT ANNUALLY ANY POSSIBLE CONFLICTS OF INTEREST TO THE BOARD OF GOVERNANCE COMMITTEE FOR RESOLUTION PER THE CONFLICTS OF INTEREST POLICY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 15a Process to establish compensation of top management official
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED USES AN INDEPENDENT CONSULTANT TO ESTABLISH AND BENCHMARK COMPENSATION FOR EMPLOYEES OF THE ORGANIZATION. THE PERSONNEL POLICY COMMITTEE MAKES RECOMMENDATIONS TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS REGARDING SALARY AND BENEFITS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 15b Process to establish compensation of other employees
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED USES AN INDEPENDENT CONSULTANT TO ESTABLISH AND BENCHMARK COMPENSATION FOR EMPLOYEES OF THE ORGANIZATION. THE PERSONNEL POLICY COMMITTEE MAKES RECOMMENDATIONS TO THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS REGARDING SALARY AND BENEFITS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 19 Required documents available to the public
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: DUCKS UNLIMITED MAKES ITS CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS, GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, AND CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC ON ITS WEBSITE (DUCKS.ORG).
